# zod-core/consistent-schema-var-name

📝 Enforce a consistent naming convention for Zod core schema variables.

💼 This rule is enabled in the ✅ `recommended` config.

<!-- end auto-generated rule header -->

## Options

<!-- begin auto-generated rule options list -->

| Name     | Description                                       | Type   |
| :------- | :------------------------------------------------ | :----- |
| `after`  | The required suffix for Zod core schema variables | String |
| `before` | The required prefix for Zod core schema variables | String |
